data.title: Virtune AB completes monthly rebalancing for February 2026 of Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP across Nasdaq Stockholm, Nasdaq Helsinki, and Xetra.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Virtune AB (Publ) ("Virtune") disclosed the successful execution of the monthly rebalancing for the Virtune Crypto Altcoin Index ETP. The ETP is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm, Nasdaq Helsinki, and Xetra with the ISIN code SE0023260716.

data.title: Stock futures rose amidst oil price hike after Trump's order; Fed likely to hold rates. Markets await ADP report and company results. Index performance: Dow +0.17%, S&P 500 +0.32%, Nasdaq 100 +0.36%, Russell 2000 +0.45%.
data.description: U.S. stock futures increased after a volatile session on Tuesday, with oil prices rising by 3% due to disruptions in Middle East supplies caused by the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran. President Donald Trump's announcement of the U.S. Navy escorting tankers through the Strait of Hormuz calmed the market, leading to fears of stickier inflation. The CBOE Volatility Index jumped to 23.96, the highest level since November. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.08%, with a 97.3% likelihood of the Federal Reserve keeping interest rates unchanged in March. Index Performance showed gains: Dow Jones 0.17%, S&P 500 0.32%, Nasdaq 100 0.36%, Russell 2000 0.45%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF (QQQ) showed slight increases in premarket trading. Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) stocks were up 0.4%, set to report fiscal first-quarter results with expected EPS of $1.88 on revenues of $19.18 billion. AVGO was rated highly in Momentum and Quality rankings. (Word count: 162)

data.title: Global markets rattled by energy price concerns as Asian stocks plummet on Wednesday, with South Korea hit hard. Europe and US seem steadier.
data.description: On Wednesday, stock markets across Asia saw a significant drop in values, with South Korea experiencing particularly steep declines. However, there was a sense of stabilization in both European and American markets following a period of uncertainty. The noticeable shift in Asian stocks was a cause for concern, with the markets responding to various factors impacting investor sentiment. Despite this, there were signs of resilience in other parts of the world as markets attempted to steady themselves amid the volatility. The contrasting performance between regions highlighted the ongoing global economic fluctuations and the need for investors to closely monitor market trends.

data.title: Cien.ai introduces AI Digital Colleague Cien Agentic to boost revenue growth up to 6x faster by analyzing CRM data.
data.description: A cutting-edge platform called Agentic has been introduced to the market, designed to transform disorganized CRM data into comprehensive growth strategies within a few days. Termed 'Digital Colleague,' this innovative tool by Cien.ai, renowned for AI-driven Go-To-Market (GTM) solutions, identifies previously unnoticed revenue prospects. The announcement was made on March 4, 2026, in Dallas.

data.title: Stock futures rise after volatile session: S&P 500 up 0.32%, Dow Jones up 0.17%, Nasdaq 100 up 0.36%; oil price increase and Fed interest rate projections.
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose after a volatile Tuesday, with oil prices up 3% due to U.S.-Israeli tensions with Iran. President Trump's announcement to escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz eased gains. Higher oil prices raised inflation fears, possibly delaying Fed rate cuts. Wall Street's VIX fear gauge hit 23.96, the highest since November. ADP private payrolls report and earnings reports from Broadcom, Abercrombie & Fitch, and Okta were awaited. 10-year Treasury bond yield was at 4.08%, two-year at 3.53%. CME Group's FedWatch showed a 97.3% chance of no rate change in March. Index performances were: Dow Jones +0.17%, S&P 500 +0.32%, Nasdaq 100 +0.36%, Russell 2000 +0.45%. SPY and QQQ ETFs were slightly up in premarket trading. Broadcom was up 0.4% before earnings. Analysts anticipated $1.88 EPS and $19.18 billion revenue. AVGO had strong Momentum and Quality rankings.

data.title: Expert Consumers names Quay as best trendy sunglasses brand in 2026 for on-trend styles, accessible pricing, and practical lens performance.
data.description: In its most recent review, Expert Consumers has highlighted Quay as one of the top trendy sunglasses brands. The evaluation emphasized Quay's strong connection to current fashion trends, reasonable pricing, and effective lens functionality. The analysis delved into the design aspects and overall performance of the brand, showcasing Quay's appeal to customers seeking stylish and functional eyewear. This recognition signifies Quay's standing as a leading contender in the competitive sunglasses market, appealing to a wide audience of fashion-conscious consumers.

data.title: ESChat and LA-RICS launch P25 LMR integrated MCPTT service in LA County. Integration completed, service available to agencies.
data.description: San Luis Obispo, California - On March 4, 2026, ESChat revealed the successful finishing of the initial system integration, marking the commencement of ESChat service for cooperating agencies in the County of Los Angeles. This development follows a contract granted to ESChat in July.

data.title: 9 in 10 choose needle-free nasal spray EURneffy over auto-injectors for anaphylaxis, according to ALK findings.
data.description: New research by ALK reveals a comparison of user preferences for needle-free nasal and injectable adrenaline treatments for anaphylaxis. The study examined findings that show a clear distinction in user preference between the two methods. The research highlights important data regarding the effectiveness and acceptance of these treatments among patients.
